title: ASTRA LOST IN SPACE
sourceNotes: Single-cour 12-episode adaptation (Lerche, 2019) of Kenta Shinohara's completed manga; episodes are cumulative within one season. The manga is complete at 49 collected chapters across 5 tankobon volumes (Vol 1 "Planet Camp" ch 1-7, Vol 2 "Star of Hope" ch 8-18, Vol 3 "Secrets" ch 19-28, Vol 4 "Revelation" ch 29-38, Vol 5 "Friend-Ship" ch 39-49). AniList lists 53 chapters, reflecting the Shonen Jump+ digital chapter split; ranges here follow the 49-chapter collected/volume numbering. Boundaries are anchored by the direct title matches between volume finales and episode titles (ep 1 "Planet Camp", ep 4 "Star of Hope", ep 6 "Secret", ep 9 "Revelation", ep 12 "Friend-Ship"), so arcs are volume-aligned; episode 1 is a double-length premiere covering all of Volume 1.
